outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated directional volatility expected with spot at structural gamma flip zone and negative GEX in longer-dated expiries amplifying moves
outlook.summary: Price pinned at multi-expiry gamma flip (686.29) between dominant PUT support (675-680) and CALL resistance (690-700). Negative GEX in WEEKLY_1 (-2.13B) and MONTHLY_1 (-2.23B) amplifies breakout risk. Max Pain magnet active around 684-687 zone suggesting mean reversion.

Dominant put support across all 5 expiries with 66,265 OI in WEEKLY_2 and 68,662 OI in MONTHLY_1. Primary structural floor below spot.
Structural gamma equilibrium in WEEKLY_2, MONTHLY_1, and MONTHLY_2. Spot exactly at this critical inflection point - high directional probability.
Intraday gamma flip. Below this level dealers become short gamma, accelerating downside. Above = positive gamma stability.

outlook.summary: Spot (612.1) sits exactly at WEEKLY_2/MONTHLY_1/MONTHLY_2 gamma flip creating a critical inflection point. While 0DTE shows positive GEX (1.18B), longer expiries are negative (-1.42B combined) indicating volatility amplification risk on directional break. Massive put wall structure below (585-600) provides strong support, while call resistance builds at 620-630. Max Pain at 612 for MONTHLY_2 creates magnetic attraction. Break above 615 targets 620; breakdown below 610 targets 600.

levels.motivazione: WEEKLY_2 + MONTHLY_1 + MONTHLY_2 gamma flip exactly at spot. Critical inflection point where dealer delta-hedging behavior shifts. Negative GEX in these expiries amplifies moves away from this level.
Structural support across ALL 5 expiries. Monthly_1 shows massive 102K put OI. Combined with 0DTE Max Pain at 601, creates magnetic support zone. High volume in 0DTE (72,661 VOL).
Key level across all expiries. 0DTE shows 7,800 CALL OI with 167,997 VOL (highest volume). Monthly_1 has 35K put + 24K call OI. Immediate support/resistance battle zone.
Deep structural support with MONTHLY_1 holding 104,684 put OI (largest single-strike OI in dataset). WEEKLY_1 adds 33,989 OI. Last line of defense before 585.
MONTHLY_2 Max Pain at 612.0 - essentially at spot. Creates magnetic price attraction for April expiry. Combined with gamma flip confluence, pins price at current levels.

Deep support across all 5 expiries. WEEKLY_1 shows 56,104 OI. MONTHLY_1 adds 35,513 OI. Ultimate structural floor.
Major resistance in 4 longer-dated expiries. MONTHLY_1 has 35,410 CALL OI. WEEKLY_2 shows 18,498 OI. Upside target if 620 breaks.

Intraday gamma pivot for 0DTE. Below this level, dealers may accelerate selling. Above, they provide support. Key for day trading direction.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Mixed GEX profile: 0DTE positive (+10.06B) suppresses near-term vol, but negative weekly GEX (-3.53B combined) suggests volatility expansion if price breaks 6800-6900 range. MONTHLY_2 heavy negative (-10.51B) indicates structural fragility.

Dealers long gamma on 0DTE/monthly but short weekly gamma - expect pinning near 6865-6870 into expiry, breakout risk if 6800 or 6900 breached.

SINGLE: 29K Put OI in MONTHLY_1, 22K in MONTHLY_2. Deep structural floor - tail risk protection level.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Positive total GEX suppresses volatility; expect range-bound behavior with magnetic pull toward heavy OI clusters near spot
outlook.summary: Market is in a positive gamma regime with dealers long gamma across all expiries (total ~2.49B), indicating stability and price suppression. Spot (25160.93) sits between two massive magnetic forces: the 25075 CALL OI concentration (4034 contracts) just below and the 26000 RESONANCE WALL above. The 24900 Max Pain level acts as a downward anchor. Key gamma flip at 25875 (WEEKLY_2) defines the upper equilibrium boundary. Expect pinning behavior with limited directional movement unless volume surges.
